title: Collect and pack eggs for human consumption
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and pack eggs for human consumption demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for collecting, packing and storing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for collecting, packing and storing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks for collecting, packing and storing eggs.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks for collecting, packing and storing eggs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks for collecting, packing and storing eggs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the tasks for collecting, packing and storing eggs.

pcs.text: Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work area and equipment are clean and ready for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Collect eggs

pcs.text: Ensure that nests and egg conveyors are free of obstructions according to enterprise food safety and animal welfare procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that nests and egg conveyors are free of obstructions according to enterprise food safety and animal welfare procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that nests and egg conveyors are free of obstructions according to enterprise food safety and animal welfare procedures.

pcs.text: Collect eggs by placing eggs onto trays with pointed end down
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect eggs by placing eggs onto trays with pointed end down?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect eggs by placing eggs onto trays with pointed end down.

pcs.text: Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs to match handling rate according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs to match handling rate according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate egg handling equipment and control flow of eggs to match handling rate according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Remove heavily marked, dirty, cracked, leaking eggs or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically according to food safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove heavily marked, dirty, cracked, leaking eggs or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically according to food safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove heavily marked, dirty, cracked, leaking eggs or weak-shelled eggs manually or mechanically according to food safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect eggs

elements.title: Pack and store eggs

pcs.text: Pack eggs to be sold for human consumption, keeping production categories separate, and wrap pallets as required ready for transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Pack eggs to be sold for human consumption, keeping production categories separate, and wrap pallets as required ready for transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pack eggs to be sold for human consumption, keeping production categories separate, and wrap pallets as required ready for transport.

pcs.text: Label packed eggs, pallets and other packaging according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label packed eggs, pallets and other packaging according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label packed eggs, pallets and other packaging according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cool room temperature and humidity, and adjust if required.

pcs.text: Transfer eggs to cool room or grading floor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer eggs to cool room or grading floor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer eggs to cool room or grading floor.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Pack and store eggs

elements.title: Clean and/or sanitise work areas and equipment

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to cleaning and/or sanitising
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to cleaning and/or sanitising?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks related to cleaning and/or sanitising.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and sanitising
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and sanitising?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning and sanitising.

pcs.text: Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and prepare cleaning equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare cleaning equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare cleaning equipment.

pcs.text: Clean and/or sanitise egg conveyors, cool room, all equipment and work areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and/or sanitise egg conveyors, cool room, all equipment and work areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and/or sanitise egg conveyors, cool room, all equipment and work areas.

pcs.text: Control pests in egg collection, packing and storage areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Control pests in egg collection, packing and storage areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Control pests in egg collection, packing and storage areas.

pcs.text: Take swab samples of work and/or egg surfaces for testing if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take swab samples of work and/or egg surfaces for testing if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take swab samples of work and/or egg surfaces for testing if required.

pcs.text: Process eggs not for retail sale according to enterprise requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Process eggs not for retail sale according to enterprise requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Process eggs not for retail sale according to enterprise requirements.

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.
